news.title: 15% of Americans say they’d be willing to work for an AI boss, according to new poll
news.summary: According to a Quinnipiac University poll, 15% of Americans say they'd be willing to have a job where their direct supervisor was an AI program that assigned tasks and set schedules.

news.title: Popular AI gateway startup LiteLLM ditches controversial startup Delve
news.summary: LiteLLM had obtained two security compliance certifications via Delve and fell victim to some horrific credential-stealing malware last week.

news.title: As more Americans adopt AI tools, fewer say they can trust the results
news.summary: AI adoption is rising in the U.S., but trust remains low, with most Americans concerned about transparency, regulation, and the technology’s broader societal impact, according to a new Quinnipiac poll

news.title: Mantis Biotech is making ‘digital twins’ of humans to help solve medicine’s data availability problem
news.summary: Mantis takes disparate sources of data to make synthetic datasets that can be used to build so-called "digital twins" of the human body, representing anatomy, physiology and behavior.

news.title: ScaleOps raises $130M to improve computing efficiency amid AI demand
news.summary: ScaleOps just raised $130M to tackle GPU shortages and soaring AI cloud costs by automating infrastructure in real time.

news.title: AI chip startup Rebellions raises $400 million at $2.3B valuation in pre-IPO round
news.summary: The startup, which is planning to go public later this year, designs chips specifically for AI inference, another challenger to Nvidia's dominance.

news.title: Mistral AI raises $830M in debt to set up a data center near Paris
news.summary: Mistral aims to start operating the data center by the second quarter of 2026.

news.title: Qodo raises $70M for code verification as AI coding scales
news.summary: As AI floods software development with code, Qodo is betting the real challenge is making sure it actually works.

news.title: Starcloud raises $170 million Series A to build data centers in space
news.summary: Starcloud becomes the fastest Y Combinator startup to reach unicorn status, just 17 months after demo day.

news.title: Why OpenAI really shut down Sora

products.tagline: AI turns your goal into one daily action.
